description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of a softly ribbed the neckline, graphic print detailing on the front with lettering, and brand tab appliqued on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Do not dry clean If high-rise buildings are your passion, this white tee from s.oliver will suit you perfectly. With a great image of sky scrapers on the front in eye-catching colors, and the soft feel of cotton against your skin, you can't ask for a better t-shirt! Pair it with jeans, shorts or cargos, and look super cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
